summary: Created comprehensive Build Orchestrator System documentation at Documents/System/Build-Orchestrator-System.md. The document covers the full pattern: overview and philosophy, folder structure, execution flow (with visual diagram), worker brief format, thread title conventions, build types, dependency management, worker close behavior, orchestrator responsibilities, and a concrete example.
learnings: Structured the doc with 11 major sections for comprehensive coverage
Added visual flow diagram using ASCII art for clarity
Included tables for quick reference throughout
The template for worker briefs serves as both documentation and practical copy-paste reference
decisions: Organized by concept rather than chronology (structure before flow)
Included full completion JSON schema inline rather than referencing external spec
Added 'Quick Reference' section at end for fast lookup
Used concrete calendar-v2 example to illustrate abstract concepts
follow_up: May want a companion SKILL.md in Skills/ for running the orchestrator pattern
Consider adding troubleshooting section for common failure modes
